news.title: 学生贷款将移交财政部，有学生债务者需了解的事项
news.summary_en: Borrowers do not need to do anything as the change goes through, the administration says.
news.author: Associated Press
news.original_title: Student loans are headed to the Treasury Department. Here’s what to know if you have student debt
news.summary_cn: 美国教育部正在 dismantle，学生贷款管理将移交财政部。有联邦学生贷款的借款人应了解这一变化可能带来的影响，包括还款流程和服务提供商的变更。

news.title: 财政部开始接管学生贷款，教育部逐步 dismantle
news.summary_en: Eventually, the Treasury Department is to take responsibility for all student loans.
news.author: Associated Press
news.original_title: Treasury Department begins taking over student loans as the Education Department gets dismantled
news.summary_cn: 随着特朗普政府 dismantle 教育部，财政部已开始接管联邦学生贷款项目。这一转变标志着联邦学生资助体系的重大重组。

news.title: 各州诉讼称特朗普的大学数据授权令威胁学生隐私
news.summary_en: The mandate is an expansion of a 40-year-old system known as IPEDS.
news.author: Tribune News Service
news.original_title: States’ lawsuit argues Trump’s college data mandate threatens student privacy
news.summary_cn: 多个州对特朗普政府提起诉讼，质疑其要求大学收集和报告学生数据的新规定。诉讼认为该授权令侵犯了学生的隐私权。

news.title: 州议员推动扩大允许大学校园持枪的法律
news.summary_en: The push comes amid another year of intense debate over gun policy in state legislatures.
news.author: Tribune News Service
news.original_title: State lawmakers push to expand laws allowing guns on college campuses
news.summary_cn: 多个州的立法者正在推动扩大允许 concealed carry 枪支进入大学校园的法律范围。这一议题引发了关于校园安全和个人权利的激烈辩论。

news.title: 法官推翻阿肯色州要求学校展示十诫的法律
news.summary_en: Arkansas isn't the only state where Republican-led legislatures have enacted such law.
news.author: Associated Press
news.original_title: Judge strikes down Arkansas law mandating schools display the Ten Commandments. Here’s what to know
news.summary_cn: 联邦法官裁定阿肯色州要求公立学校展示十诫的法律违宪。这一裁决对宗教与公立学校分离原则具有重要意义。

news.title: 大学共和党人就分会注销起诉佛罗里达大学校长
news.summary_en: Officials cited an alleged antisemitic gesture.
news.author: Associated Press
news.original_title: College Republicans sue University of Florida’s president over deactivation of its chapter
news.summary_cn: 佛罗里达大学共和党学生组织对该校校长提起诉讼，指控其不当注销该学生组织分会。案件涉及学生组织权利和大学管理权限。

news.title: 五角大楼与常春藤联盟决裂，高校为军事项目进一步变化做准备
news.summary_en: Some believe the Trump administration is sacrificing technical expertise in the name of ideology.
news.author: Associated Press
news.original_title: Pentagon’s break with Ivy League leaves colleges bracing for further changes to military programs
news.summary_cn: 五角大楼宣布与多所常春藤盟校断绝关系，引发高校对军事 ROTC 项目和研究合作可能发生变化的担忧。

news.title: 家庭向州寻求民权支持，特朗普 dismantle 教育部
news.summary_en: Families say they’ve had nowhere else to turn.
news.author: Associated Press
news.original_title: Families turn to states for civil rights support as Trump dismantles the Education Department
news.summary_cn: 随着特朗普政府 dismantle 联邦教育部，越来越多家庭转向州政府寻求民权保护和教育支持，特别是在特殊教育和平等教育机会方面。

news.title: 五角大楼将切断与哥伦比亚、耶鲁、布朗等Hegseth指责为觉醒的高校关系
news.summary_en: Hegseth said the universities have become “breeding grounds of toxic indoctrination” that undermine military values.
news.author: Associated Press
news.original_title: Pentagon to cut ties with Columbia, Yale, Brown and others Hegseth accuses of ‘wokeness’
news.summary_cn: 国防部长Hegseth宣布将终止五角大楼与多所知名大学的合作关系，指责这些学校过于觉醒，影响军事人才培养。

news.title: 识字率落后，儿科医院开始筛查阅读能力
news.summary_en: The program focuses on clinics near schools where kindergarten readiness scores run low.
news.author: Associated Press
news.original_title: As literacy rates lag, a pediatric hospital is screening for reading ability
news.summary_cn: 面对儿童识字率下降的挑战，一些儿科医院开始在常规体检中筛查儿童阅读能力，以早期发现和干预学习困难。

news.title: 威斯康星州学校和教师起诉共和党领导的立法机构寻求更多资金
news.summary_en: The lawsuit argues that schools are in crisis, with high-needs students facing the greatest risk.
news.author: Associated Press
news.original_title: Wisconsin schools, teachers file lawsuit against GOP-led Legislature seeking more funding
news.summary_cn: 威斯康星州的学区和教师对州立法机构提起诉讼，指控其教育拨款不足，违反州宪法对公共教育的保障。

news.title: 教育部将更多职责移交给其他联邦机构
news.summary_en: A pair of new agreements move closer to the goal of shutting down the department.
news.author: Associated Press
news.original_title: Education Department hands off more of its responsibilities to other US agencies
news.summary_cn: 随着 dismantle 进程推进，教育部正在将其职责转移给其他联邦机构，包括财政部、卫生与公众服务部等。

news.title: 肯塔基州最高法院裁定特许学校法违宪
news.summary_en: Charter schools have been legal in Kentucky since 2017.
news.author: Associated Press
news.original_title: Kentucky Supreme Court rules that charter schools law is unconstitutional
news.summary_cn: 肯塔基州最高法院裁定该州特许学校法律违宪，认为其将公共教育资金转移到私立机构违反了州宪法。

news.title: 白宫压力导致大学切断与帮助少数族裔的非营利组织关系
news.summary_en: The PhD Project helps racial minorities earn doctorate degrees.
news.author: Associated Press
news.original_title: White House pressure leads universities to cut ties with nonprofit that helps racial minorities
news.summary_cn: 在白宫压力下，多所美国大学终止了与帮助少数族裔学生的非营利组织的合作关系，引发关于高等教育多样性的争议。

news.title: 美国学生抗议ICE，德州欲惩罚其所在学校
news.summary_en: Students Across the U.S. Are Protesting ICE. Texas Wants to Punish Their Schools.
news.author: The New York Times News Service Syndicate
news.original_title: Students Across the U.S. Are Protesting ICE. Texas Wants to Punish Their Schools.
news.summary_cn: 美国多地学生举行抗议移民和海关执法局(ICE)的活动，德克萨斯州立法者提议对允许学生抗议的学校进行惩罚。

news.title: 教师描述移民执法对课堂的影响，挑战特朗普政策
news.summary_en: Educators around the country described rumors of immigration raids that scared away students.
news.author: Associated Press
news.original_title: Teachers describe immigration enforcement’s impact on classrooms in challenge of Trump policy
news.summary_cn: 教育工作者在法庭文件中描述移民执法行动对课堂环境的负面影响，特别是对学生心理健康和学习氛围的冲击。

news.title: 数据显示幼儿园入学准备程度因收入差异很大，城市介入提供帮助
news.summary_en: The first five years of a child’s life are among the most critical for development.
news.author: Associated Press
news.original_title: Kindergarten readiness varies widely by income, new data shows. Cities are stepping in to help
news.summary_cn: 新数据显示低收入家庭儿童在幼儿园入学准备方面明显落后于高收入家庭儿童。多个城市正在启动项目帮助弱势儿童做好准备。

news.title: 特朗普要求哈佛支付10亿美元，长期对峙似乎加深
news.summary_en: Trump’s latest escalation comes as other parts of his higher education campaign are teetering.
news.author: Associated Press
news.original_title: Trump demands $1 billion from Harvard as a prolonged standoff appears to deepen
news.summary_cn: 特朗普政府要求哈佛大学支付10亿美元并改变其政策，作为恢复联邦资助的条件。双方的僵局仍在持续。

news.title: 美国称纽约学校将名称从雷鸟改为T鸟违反民权法
news.summary_en: The government now says the state mandate against Native American mascots violates federal law.
news.author: Associated Press
news.original_title: New York school violated civil rights law by changing name from ‘Thunderbirds’ to ‘T-Birds,’ US says
news.summary_cn: 联邦教育部门裁定纽约一所学校在更改吉祥物名称时违反了民权法，认为该决定涉及歧视因素。

news.title: 保守团体在联邦诉讼中称洛杉矶学校政策损害白人学生利益
news.summary_en: The lawsuit targets a policy that provides benefits to schools with predominantly non-white students.
news.author: Associated Press
news.original_title: Conservative group says Los Angeles school policy hurts white students in federal lawsuit
news.summary_cn: 保守派法律团体对洛杉矶联合学区提起诉讼，指控其多样性政策歧视白人学生。此案引发关于教育平等政策的广泛讨论。

news.title: 随着特朗普 dismantle 教育部，该部门开立的性暴力调查减少
news.summary_en: Investigations into allegations schools mishandled sexual assault complaints have dropped dramatically.
news.author: Associated Press
news.original_title: The Education Department is opening fewer sexual violence investigations as Trump dismantles it
news.summary_cn: 联邦教育部正在减少校园性暴力调查的数量，引发对校园安全和受害者权益保护的担忧。

news.title: 特朗普签署法律将全脂牛奶重新纳入学校午餐
news.summary_en: Nondairy drinks such as fortified soy milk may also be on the menu in the...
news.author: Associated Press
news.original_title: Trump signs a law returning whole milk to school lunches
news.summary_cn: 特朗普总统签署法案，取消奥巴马时期学校午餐营养标准中对牛奶脂肪含量的限制，允许全脂牛奶重返学校午餐。

news.title: 田纳西大学恢复因Charlie Kirk帖子被解雇的教授职务，和解金50万美元
news.summary_en: Darren Michael returned to his position as a tenured faculty member effective Dec. 30.
news.author: Associated Press
news.original_title: Tennessee university reinstates professor fired for Charlie Kirk post and settles for $500k
news.summary_cn: 田纳西州立大学与一名被解雇的教授达成50万美元和解协议，并恢复其教职。该教授因转发Turning Point USA创始人Charlie Kirk的帖子而被解雇。

news.title: 法官阻止特朗普政府从Head Start拨款申请中删除DEI相关术语
news.summary_en: The directive on the forbidden words raised confusion for Head Start directors.
news.author: Associated Press
news.original_title: Judge blocks Trump administration from purging DEI-related terms from Head Start grant applications
news.summary_cn: 联邦法官发布禁令，阻止特朗普政府要求Head Start项目在拨款申请中删除多元化、公平和包容性(DEI)相关内容。

news.title: 特朗普政府资金威胁让 childcare 提供者和家长感到不安
news.summary_en: It’s unclear if or when child care providers and families will feel the pinch.
news.author: Associated Press
news.original_title: Trump administration funding threats set child care providers and parents on edge
news.summary_cn: 特朗普政府威胁削减儿童早期教育项目资金，让全国范围内的 childcare 提供者和依赖这些服务的家庭感到担忧。

news.title: 无家可归青少年表示需要学校和社會服务提供更多帮助
news.summary_en: Research suggests the U.S. is missing its biggest opportunity to prevent youth homelessness.
news.author: Tribune News Service
news.original_title: Homeless youth say they need more from schools, social services
news.summary_cn: 无家可归的青少年呼吁学校和社會服务机构提供更多支持，包括稳定住所、心理健康服务和教育连续性保障。

news.title: 特朗普官员禁止Head Start提供者在拨款申请中使用女性和种族等词汇
news.summary_en: The directive could reshape the early education program.
news.author: Associated Press
news.original_title: Trump officials bar Head Start providers from using ‘women’ and ‘race’ in grant applications
news.summary_cn: 特朗普政府发布指令，要求Head Start早期教育项目在联邦拨款申请中避免使用女性、种族等涉及性别和种族认同的词汇。
